title: agrostis eminens
side_effects: Agrostis eminens can have side effects if used improperly, such as excessive consumption leading to nausea and vomiting, or long-term exposure causing damage to the liver and kidneys. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can also result in seizures, tremors, and other neurological disorders. The active compounds in the plant can interact with other medications, exacerbating conditions such as high blood pressure and diabetes. Furthermore, uncontrolled use of Agrostis eminens can also lead to allergic reactions, including skin rashes and respiratory issues.
